purpose: Machine-readable WellFit full repository inventory and coverage audit for future agents. It records scanned paths, exclusions, protected areas, file groups, mapping coverage against WORK_MAP/product-readiness/route/API registers, stale or duplicate candidates, module/topic assignments, leading sources, risk levels, and follow-up actions without modifying runtime product code.

scan_scope.read_only_native_scope: native/** including native/unity/WellFitBuddyAR/** as protected inventory

protected_paths.reason: Runtime Next.js app routes/shell; inventory only for this task.
Runtime UI components; inventory only for this task.
Runtime domain/client libraries; inventory only for this task.
Firebase Functions/backend code; inventory only for this task.
Compliance/security guardrail file; do not modify in this task.
Unity AR protected read-only inventory; do not overwrite or merge PR #13.
Protected compliance/safety topics require explicit human review.

recommended_follow_up_actions.action: Run node scripts/wellfit-dev-agent/src/repository-inventory-check.mjs after major register, route, API, docs, script, or protected inventory changes.
Review unmapped protected runtime/native files before future edits; map only through existing WORK_MAP/product-readiness/project-register files.
Triage stale/duplicate candidates by marking stale or duplicate in existing TODO/status docs; do not delete historical context automatically.
When adding app pages or API routes, update routes.json/apis.json and rerun quality gate.
Keep repository-inventory.json refreshed through scoped documentation tasks rather than automatic script rewrites.
